---
title: "Showcase"
number-sections: true
---

## A Place to Share Your Favorite Tips, Tricks, and Tools

Have something you discovered that you think others would find useful? A neat 
trick, a useful tool, a clever workflow? This is the place to share it!

It doesn't have to be anything fancy, or groundbreaking, or even
warrant its own page; put it in a gist and link it here! The goal is to create a 
space where we can share the little things that make our work easier, more 
efficient, or just more enjoyable.


::: {.list-table}

- - Name
  - Date
  - Description
  - Link

- - Tinashe
  - 2026-05-01
  - Parsing a csv of authors
  - [gist](https://gist.github.com/TinasheMTapera/884acbaf90c1900b32d2cae8f8aa41de)

:::

Want to add your own? Just create a gist with your tip, trick, or tool, and then 
add it to the table above by following the [Contribution Guide](../CONTRIBUTING.qmd)!
